arts.ttl: 10 Greatest Leeds United Players in Football History [Ranked]
arts.sum: Leeds United enjoyed great success in the late 1960s and early 1970s, winning the FA Cup in 1972.

arts.sum: City: Oliver Dovin; Joel Latibeaudiere, Bobby Thomas, Liam Kitching; Milan van Ewijk, Victor Torp, Jamie Allen, Jack Rudoni, Jake Bidwell; Brandon Thomas-Asante, Ellis Simms. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Leeds Eyeing £7.5m Midfielder for Summer Window as Hurdles Emerge
arts.sum: Leeds United are performing well at the top of the Championship but one star's future is uncertain for now

arts.ttl: Coventry City v Leeds United live updates and team news as Matt Grimes set for debut
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. The Sky Blues have enjoyed a good run of form in recent weeks, beating Bristol City, Blackburn, Watford and Swansea in the league and tonight face one of heir biggest tests against the table toppers who are on an incredible run themselves, having lost just one game in their last 16 in the division - a sequence that has seen them win 11 of those matches.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Harrison wants Everton permanent deal, other PL clubs keen
arts.sum: Leeds United still have Jack Harrison on the books at the moment, currently on his second successive loan spell at Everton and eager for a permanent deal. The Athletic have now shared an update on Harrison’s stance on a permanent transfer, revealing that the winger wishes to fight for a permanent deal at Everton and leave Leeds for good as a result.

arts.ttl: Leeds United sent clear Mateo Joseph transfer instruction after £10m decision
arts.sum: But former Leeds midfielder Palmer believes it was the right call to keep Joseph until the summer with no new faces coming in at Elland Road in the Janaury transfer window . Carlton Palmer has backed Leeds United's decision to reject any transfer interest in Mateo Joseph .

arts.ttl: Leeds handed Premier League warning as Alan Brazil fears one thing could cost them
arts.sum: Leeds United's lack of conviction in front of goal has been highlighted as an area of concern in their race for promotion to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Preston, Leeds have Greenwood fee already agreed
arts.sum: Leeds United attacking midfielder Sam Greenwood is enjoying his time at Preston this season, and director Peter Ridsdale has given a key update on the possibility of a permanent deal. Peter Ridsdale: Leeds and Preston have already agreed fee for Sam Greenwood

arts.ttl: 'Irrelevant' - Peter Ridsdale backtracks over Leeds United transfer comments - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Preston North End director Peter Ridsdale is adamant Leeds United's promotion push will have no bearing on the situation surrounding Sam Greenwood’s future. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Warnock: Leeds’ Dan James is my favourite Ch’ship player
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Dan James is flying at the moment with goals and assists in the Championship, and Neil Warnock is full of praise. Dan James is one of those nailed-on starters right now, fresh from putting the sword to Cardiff City with a goal and two assists, moments that will be extra sweet for a former Swansea City man.
